summary: Home Gamification v2 (Elegante) redesign - All features verified working correctly. Tested Matchday Card with dynamic micro-messages, Performance Card with large position + 3 stats, Trend bar chart (no colored circles), Weekly Goal card, Rankings section, and CTA navigation.
critical_code_review_comments: Home Gamification v2 redesign implemented correctly per requirements
LastFiveIndicator.tsx properly renders bar chart with orange highlight for latest matchday
Dynamic micro-message correctly shows 'You scored X.X points' for COMPLETED status
Performance card displays large position (1°) with CURRENT POSITION label and 3 stats
Weekly Goal card shows flag icon with dynamic goal text
Orange color correctly used ONLY for CTA button and highlighted trend bar
Old design elements (colored circles, Stats coming soon) successfully removed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Home Gamification v2 redesign is complete and working. User ilio@raimondi.it (username: robrai888888888) has COMPLETED Giornata 4 with 2.0 points, ranked 1st in liga2 with 6.0 total points. Last 5 performance: [0.0, 0.0, 4.0, 2.0]. All new gamification features working: (1) Dynamic micro-message under matchday title shows correct text per status, (2) Performance Card with large 1° position + CURRENT POSITION label + 3 stats (Total/Matchday/Avg), (3) Trend bar chart with orange highlight on latest matchday, (4) Weekly Goal card with flag icon, (5) Rankings preview below Weekly Goal. No colored circles visible (old design removed). CTA button correctly navigates to /live/ for COMPLETED matchday.

matchday_card_dynamic_message.details: COMPLETED status shows 'You scored 2.0 points' message

performance_card.details: Large '1°' position, CURRENT POSITION label, 3 stats: Total Points (6.0), Matchday Points (2.0), Avg Last 5 (1.5)

trend_bar_chart.details: Bar chart renders with matchday 4 (latest) in orange (#F59E0B), others in light blue. Points labels above bars.

weekly_goal_card.details: Flag icon with goal text: 'Score at least 2 pts to keep #1 spot'

rankings_section.details: Shows 'liga2' league name and top users

cta_navigation.details: VIEW RESULTS button navigates to /live/{matchdayId} correctly

no_colored_circles.details: Old Last 5 Results colored circles NOT visible - replaced with bar chart

orange_color_usage.details: Orange (#F59E0B) used only for CTA button and highlighted trend bar, NOT for stat values

cache_issue_note: Initial test showed stale translation '1th place' instead of '#1 spot' due to Metro cache. Resolved by clearing /app/frontend/.metro-cache
